titleStmt.title: SII 41.124: original edition by S. Rajagopal
No. 124. (A.R. No. 123 of 1905.) Tiruppuḍaimarudūr, Ambasamudram Taluk, Tirunelveli District. On the east and north walls of the Chanḍēśvara shrine in the Pūtarjunēśvara temple at Tiruppuḍaimarudūr.

summary.p: Vaṭṭeḻuttu. Records a sale of some pieces of land by some brāhamaṇas of Iyalāṭṭimaṅgalam, a brahmadēya in Muḷḷi-nāḍu to Piḍavūr-uḍaiyāṉ Ambalavaṉ Niṟāḍi of Piḍavūr-nāḍu in Chōḻa-nāḍu.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . kān=taḷūrccālai kalamaṟutta koirājā[ja] kesari
panmarkku yāṇṭu 10āvatu Ivvāṇṭu coṇāṭṭu vaṭakaraip piṭavūr
nāṭṭuppiṭavūruṭaiyāṉ Ampalavaṉ niṟāṭikku Irājarājavaḷa nā
ṭṭu nāṭṭu muḷḷi nāṭṭu brahmadeyam Iyalāṭṭi maṅkala
ttu Iyalāṭṭi maṅkala(m)muṭaiya vaṭavāyakattu nanta caṉma
ccaruppētipaṭṭaṉum Ivvūruṭaiya vaṭavāyakattu bhavā
graṇiccaruppEtipaṭṭaṉum Ivaṉ tampi paṟpaṉāvaṉum I
vvūr kaviṇiyaṉ vempaṉ vempacaṉmaṉum Ivvaṉaivo
kuṭutta pūmiyāvatu Ivvūr noccimaṭaivāykkālu
cemmaṉ vaḻi vayakkaliṉ kiḻarukey pōṉa vā
ykkālālun nirpāñcu nellu viḷaiyun nilattukku kiḻel
lai tiruppaṭumarutil śrīkoyilil niṉṟu teṟku nokki Iya
lāṭṭimaṅkalattukkey ponta peruvaḻikkum Ivaḻi mekku
nokkippoṉa vaḻikkuñ cemmaṉ vayakkiṉa vayakkalukku va
ṭakkum melellai taṇporuntattukkuk kiḻakkum vaṭave
llai tiruppaṭumarutil devarpūmikkut teṟkum Ivvicai[ n=ta perunā]
ṉ kellaiyuḷ Akappaṭṭa nilam mūṉṟumā Innilam muṉṟumāvilu
n tiruppaṭumarutil tevar tevatāṉam vaṭamel mulai Arai Innilan
niṅkalāka niṉṟa nilam Irumāvaraiyum Innantacaṉmaccaruppetipa
ṭṭaṉeṉ nāṉ piṟantuṭaiya Eṉṟopātinilaṉ mākāṇiyum bhavāgra
ṇic caruppēti paṭṭaṉeṉ nāṉpiṟantuṭaiya Eṉṟopāti nilam kāṇi
muntirikaiyum Ivaṉ tampi paṟpaṉāpaṉeṉ nāṉ piṟantuṭaiya Eṉ
ṟopāti nilam kāṇi muntirikaiyum vempaṉ vem pacaṉma
ṉeṉ Ivvūruṭaiya jātavetac caruppetippaṭṭaṉ piṟantuṭai
yaṉāyiruntavarai māvaraikkāṇi nilamum Ivar pakkal
ṉam tāṉam peṟṟuṭaiyaṉāyirunta Ivvaraimāvaraikkāṇi
nilamumāka nilam Irumāvarai Innilam Irumāvarai nilamum U
ṇṇila moḻiviṉṟi viṟṟukkuṭuttom Innantacaṉmac carup
petipaṭṭaṉum Ibhavāgraṇic caruppeti paṭṭaṉum Ivar tampi paṟpa
ṉāpaṉum Ivvempaṉ vempacaṉmaṉum Innāl vomum piṭavūruṭai
yāṉ Ampalavaṉ niṟāṭikku Ivviṟṟukkuṭutta pūmikku vilai Ōlai yum
vilaip poruḷellāṅ kaiyyiley Aṟakkoṇṭu Ituvey vilai Ōlai
yum poruṭcelavolaiyumāka viṟṟu vilaiyāvaṇap poruṭ celvo
lai ceytu kuṭuttom Innantacaṉmac caruppapeti paṭṭaṉum Ibhavā
graṇiccaruppeti paṭṭaṉum Ivaṉ tampi paṟpaṉāpaṉum Ivvempaca
ṉmaṉum Innālvom piṭavūruṭaiyāṉ Ampalavaṉ niṟāṭikku Itdha
mvikritambhavāgraṇyā Ipparicu viṟṟukkuṭutta ni la ney kā ṉi
kāriya neḻuttu Itividitampaṟ
Ippaṭi Aṟiven puṟattu yajñabhaṭṭaneḻuttu Itividi
tam nandaśarmmaṇaḥ Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ Ivvūrc centaceri nārāyaṇaneḻuttu
Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ tiruppuṭaimaruttil Ācāryyan caṅkaranārāyaṇ
n mātevaṉeḻuttu Iti viditam govindasvāminā Iti viditam
kuvalaya candravāsinā somasena nārāyaṇen .— Ittham
Digital edition of SII 41.124 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
